name: Split Pea Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 pound cubed ham and/or 1 ham bone
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in an 8-quart stockpot.
2. Fill with water.
3. Cover and cook on high heat for 20 minutes or until boiling.
4. Stir occasionally and then reduce to low heat.
5. Cook for 60 to 70 minutes, or until peas are soft.
6. If desired, remove about 2 cups of the soup and blend in a blender.
7. Return to pot and mix for a thicker soup.
